description: Style NoteCrafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory.Product DetailsBeige handbag, contrast stitched detailing on the upper, metallic plate embellishment, two zipped compartments, inner zipped pocket , two short handles, one external zipped pocketMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe with cloth when requiredSizeLength: 18 cmWidth: 35 cmDepth: 9 cm
